headline: Hi everyone, Unfortunately, today was my last working day at the company. It has...
quote: Hi everyone, Unfortunately, today was my last working day at the company. It has been quite a journey. Over the years, I had the chance to work with probably almost every department in the company. I was part of Appodeal, Chardone, and the Accelerator. I’m sorry I didn’t get a chance to work at BidM

articles.desc: AppLovin Ads, formerly Axon, is now open to all advertisers. One company, one brand built to drive real performance for any business ready to grow.
